name.title: Accessory Name
name.description: Name shown in the Home app.

webServerUrl.title: Web Server URL
webServerUrl.description: Base URL of the corelec web_server.py (e.g. http://192.168.0.16:8999).

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to poll /api/state. HomeKit also triggers on-demand reads.

boostMinutes.title: Default Boost Duration (minutes)
boostMinutes.description: Duration used when the Boost switch is turned on from HomeKit.

clearOnDisconnect.title: Clear Values When Disconnected
clearOnDisconnect.description: When true (recommended), accessories show '—' / Not Responding when BLE is lost. When false, last known values are kept.

exposeTemp.title: Expose Temperature Sensor
exposeTemp.description: Set to false if your controller has no water temperature sensor.

exposeRedox.title: Expose Redox Sensor
exposeRedox.description: Set to true only if your controller has a Redox/ORP electrode.
